name: California Coast Credit Union - Mira Mesa Branch
description_short: California Coast Credit Union's Mira Mesa Branch is a full-service credit union offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and personal loans to San Diego County residents and workers in surrounding counties.
description_long: California Coast Credit Union operates a physical branch in Mira Mesa, San Diego, serving members who live or work in San Diego, Riverside, Orange, Los Angeles, Ventura, Imperial, or San Bernardino counties. The Mira Mesa location, situated in Mira Mesa Mall near Marshalls, functions as a full-service branch with extended hours and accessible facilities. The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, IRAs, auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, credit cards, and business banking services. Members can access competitive rates across multiple product categories and benefit from the credit union's member-focused approach. The branch distinguishes itself through convenient mall-based location, extended Friday hours (until 6 pm), Saturday availability (9 am-2 pm), and a 24-hour walk-up ATM with fee-free withdrawals and check deposit capabilities. The Mira Mesa Branch also provides free cashier's checks (one per day with valid ID), wheelchair accessibility, and direct phone support. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Cal Coast operates on a member-owned, not-for-profit basis, potentially offering better rates and lower fees than commercial banks. The institution is regulated and holds an NMLS ID, providing federally-backed consumer protections. However, as a regional credit union, membership eligibility is limited to specific geographic areas, and branch locations are fewer than national banks, though ATM access extends beyond physical locations.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended branch hours: open until 6 pm Friday and 9 am-2 pm Saturday, plus 24-hour ATM access
Fee-free ATM withdrawals and check deposits at walk-up ATM
Convenient Mira Mesa Mall location with dedicated parking lot entrance for quick access
Full-service branch handling new accounts, auto loans, credit cards, home loans, and business accounts in person
Free cashier's checks (one per day) with valid government-issued ID
Member-owned credit union structure typically offering competitive rates versus traditional banks
Serves seven-county region (San Diego, Riverside, Orange, Los Angeles, Ventura, Imperial, San Bernardino)
cons: Membership limited to employees and residents of specific counties; geographically restricted access
Limited branch network compared to major national banks reduces in-person service availability
Website content does not specify actual interest rates for savings, checking, or loan products
Phone support may have wait times; messaging response times not guaranteed
Mira Mesa is only one branch; members in other service areas must travel or use ATM/online banking
best_for: San Diego County residents and workers seeking accessible in-person credit union banking with extended hours
Borrowers shopping for auto loans, mortgages, or personal loans from a member-focused financial institution
Small business owners in the service area needing business checking, savings, and loan products
Members of the seven-county service area preferring credit union rates over traditional bank products
diagnosis: Best for San Diego County residents and workers within the seven-county service area seeking full-service credit union banking with convenient in-person branch access, competitive rates, and extended hours. Primary caveat is geographic membership restriction limiting access to those living or working in specified counties.
services: 24-hour ATM with fee-free withdrawals and check deposits
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8220 Mira Mesa Blvd Suite D, San Diego, CA 92126
